properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You called me to an army Gave me the sword of this Word to fight So I went out to the front lines Gave my all and fought with all my might But somewhere in the field I took a hit The heavy blow brought my spirit low But I would never quit

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've been wounded, but I'm still a soldier The battle took its toll on me But never on my soul Standing ever with my Lord until the war is over I've been wounded, but I’m still a soldier

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: See the scars from bloody battles Holding truth the enemy contends Even like my captain I have some wounds in the house of my friends And sometimes in my mind I struggle still But He's healed me and I'm ready to carry out His will

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Onward Christian soldier Marching as to war With the blood of Jesus Going on before
